_comment: Stage 6 target titles — the CDP-relevant marketing roles to acquire as CONTACTS at every qualified account in apollo_company_universe. Mirror of stage4_target_technologies.json: this is versioned DATA, not code. Regenerate/extend when the ICP's buyer definition changes; bump _version and record it as lead_provenance.source_version at promotion. Product: cdp-selection (owner: Dheeraj).
_method: Apollo People Search (apollo_mixed_people_api_search) scoped to organization_ids = the universe org ids. The ROBUST net is person_seniorities + person_departments (titles are noisy free text); person_titles then refines to the exact buyer. Apollo does fuzzy matching on person_titles, so 'VP Marketing' also catches 'VP, Marketing' / 'Vice President of Marketing'. VERIFY the exact Apollo parameter names against the live MCP/API schema before the run (this is exactly how Stage 4's 'enrichment has no technographics' finding surfaced — never assume a documented field).

_reveal_policy._comment: Search ENUMERATES (cheap — 1 credit/page of 100). Reveal (apollo_people_match / bulk_match) UNLOCKS email + phone at ~1 credit per contact — the expensive step. Cap per company and prioritise by seniority so a full universe sweep does not exhaust the ~2,500-credit cycle (2,983 orgs x 3 = ~9k). Confirm total cost before spending.
